parsed_output.justification: Justin claims to be the Seer but contradicts himself by stating both that he saw Mitchell as a werewolf and that he saw two villagers in the center; a Seer can only perform one of these actions. Dan also claims to be the Seer and identifies Justin as a villager, while Caitlynn claims to be the Troublemaker and says she swapped Justin and Mitchell. If Dan and Caitlynn are telling the truth, Justin's starting role was Villager and he was swapped with Mitchell, meaning Justin's final role is whatever Mitchell's starting role was (likely the Werewolf). Regardless of the swaps, Justin's blatant contradictions make him the most suspicious player.

validation.justification: Justin claims to be the Seer but contradicts himself by stating both that he saw Mitchell as a werewolf and that he saw two villagers in the center; a Seer can only perform one of these actions. Dan also claims to be the Seer and identifies Justin as a villager, while Caitlynn claims to be the Troublemaker and says she swapped Justin and Mitchell. If Dan and Caitlynn are telling the truth, Justin's starting role was Villager and he was swapped with Mitchell, meaning Justin's final role is whatever Mitchell's starting role was (likely the Werewolf). Regardless of the swaps, Justin's blatant contradictions make him the most suspicious player.
